dataset_limitations.reason: Prose expectations cannot establish semantic coverage or absence without an independent adjudication record.
Browser, update, identity, and recovery workflow passes require assertion-specific results bound to a verified workflow artifact.

citation_correctness.reason: Some paraphrased claim-to-evidence relationships lack independent adjudication; exact support was not invented.
